CachedLesson.title: CachedLesson
CachedLesson.description: A cached English lesson generated by AI to share across all users and save API quota.

key.description: Unique cache key for the lesson

type.description: Type of the lesson (grammar, tense, vocabulary, idiom)

level.description: The CEFR level of the lesson (A1, A2, etc.) if applicable

category.description: The category of the lesson if applicable

content.description: The full JSON content of the generated lesson

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the lesson was cached

DictionaryTranslation.title: DictionaryTranslation
DictionaryTranslation.description: A single word English to Khmer translation cache.

DictionaryLetter.title: DictionaryLetter
DictionaryLetter.description: A map of English words to Khmer translations for a specific letter or search query.

translations.description: Map of English words to their Khmer translations

cached_lessons/{lessonId}.description: Collection of cached AI lessons shared across all users.

dictionary_translations/{wordId}.description: Collection of English to Khmer word translations.

dictionary_letters/{letterId}.description: Collection of English to Khmer translations grouped by starting letter or batch identifier.
